diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I was running a third-party tool that crashed the game and I lost a Condensed Resin. Can I get it back?
[Agent] Sure, what's your UID?
[Caller] 708817234.
[Agent] Got it. When did this happen?
[Caller] Last night, around 2 AM my time.
[Agent] I'm checking known incidents. Nothing confirmed in Europe for that window. I can still open a compensation ticket. Let me run submit_compensation_ticket for one Condensed Resin.
[Caller] Also, the tool I was using, is that going to be a problem?
[Agent] What kind of tool?
[Caller] Some overlay thing for tracking artifact stats.
[Agent] I'm actually not sure what our policy is around third-party tool use and compensation eligibility. I don't want to open a ticket and then have it rejected or worse, flag your account. I'd like to hold off until I can confirm the policy.
[Caller] So what are my options?
[Agent] Let me transfer you to a specialist who can advise on third-party tool compensation policy. I apologize for not being able to resolve this directly.
[Caller] Fine, transfer me.
[Agent] One moment.
escalation_reason: Unable to advise on third-party tool compensation eligibility policy
